story.title: Shared Settings Demo
story.logline: A detective returns to the same archive twice and discovers that the room itself carries meaning.

settings.name: Precinct Archive
settings.description: A dim archive room where unresolved cases gather institutional dust.

moments.summary: The detective returns to the archive.
moments.synopsis: A second visit to the archive reframes the old evidence as a personal warning.
moments.setting: The same archive room, now colder and less familiar.
moments.imperatives: Show that the shared place has taken on new meaning.
